ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighbourhood where the crime occurred */,
  "longitude_x" REAL /* Longitude of the crime location */,
  "latitude_x" REAL /* Latitude of the crime location */,
  "premise_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of premises where the crime occurred */,
  "offence_id" INTEGER /* Type of offense recorded */,
  "event_unique_id" TEXT /* Unique ID for the event */,
  "occurrence_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the crime occurred */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the crime was reported */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the crime location */,
  "suspect_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspect(s) involved */,
  "victim_description" TEXT /* Description of the victim(s) involved */,
  "police_response_time" INTEGER /* Time it took for the police to respond to the crime */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the crime */,
  "related_cases" TEXT /* Reference to other crime IDs if the current crime is related to other cases */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Description of the evidence collected at the scene */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who handled the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_premise_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("premise_type_id") REFERENCES premise_types ("premise_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_offence_id FOREIGN KEY ("offence_id") REFERENCES offences ("offence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_neighbourhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_id") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough to which the neighborhood belongs */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood centroid */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Average crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the neighborhood data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offences" (
  "offence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of offence */,
  "offence_name" TEXT /* Name of the offence (e.g., Assault, Break and Enter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offence type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the offense */,
  "statutory_reference" TEXT /* Statutory law or regulation related to the offense */,
  "punishment" TEXT /* Typical punishment for the offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premise_types" (
  "premise_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premise type */,
  "premise_type" TEXT /* Name of the premise type (e.g., Commercial, Residential) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the premise type */,
  "security_measures" TEXT /* Typical security measures in place for the premise type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premise_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime being reported */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Who reported the crime */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "evidence_photos" TEXT /* Links to evidence photos */,
  "witness_statements" TEXT /* Witness statements */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the investigation */,
  "officer_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
